occurrence_sentence: "There are only a handful of facilities in the world with the capabilities necessary to produce fluxonium qubits, so our partnership with NY CREATES was a natural fit for this project," said Oleg Mukhanov Ph.D. co-founder and co-CEO of Seeqc.
Eric Becker 104 West Partners for Seeqc eric.becker@104west.com Kristin Devoe, Empire State Development Kristin.Devoe@esd.ny.gov (518) 292-5107
